seo.homeTitle: Paid Promotion Tasks - Earn with Social Media
seo.myTasksTitle: My Tasks - Track Published & Accepted Promotions
seo.myTasksDescription: Manage all your promotion tasks in one dashboard. Track published tasks with submission stats and earnings, monitor accepted tasks with deadlines and progress, and review task performance across social media platforms on AiBrand.
seo.myTasksKeywords: task management, promotion tracking, published tasks, accepted tasks, earnings tracker, social media tasks, content promotion, AiBrand dashboard
seo.createTitle: Create Promotion Task - Set Rewards & Requirements
seo.createDescription: Create paid promotion tasks on AiBrand. Set your budget, choose target platforms, define content requirements, and let social media creators promote your brand across TikTok, YouTube, Instagram and more.
seo.createKeywords: create promotion, paid tasks, brand promotion, influencer marketing, social media advertising, content requirements, promotion budget, AiBrand
seo.defaultTitle: Task Details - View Promotion Rewards & Requirements
seo.homeDescription: Discover paid social media promotion tasks on AiBrand Gold Rush Square. Earn commissions by promoting brands across TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, X (Twitter), LinkedIn and 10+ global platforms. Browse tasks, accept assignments, create content and get paid — start earning with your social media influence today.
seo.homeKeywords: paid promotion tasks, social media promotion, earn money online, influencer marketing, TikTok promotion, YouTube promotion, Instagram promotion, Facebook promotion, brand promotion, content creator jobs, social media jobs, AiBrand, online side hustle, creator economy
seo.defaultDescription: View task details and earn rewards by completing promotion tasks on AiBrand.
detail.locationScreenshotWarning: Please upload a screenshot of your published work showing the location. The screenshot must display the work's location, otherwise the review will not pass!
detail.interactionScreenshotHint: Upload up to 5 screenshots, make sure they are clear and visible
detail.interactionHint: Please complete the following actions first: {{actions}}, then upload screenshots
create.insufficientBalance.title: Insufficient Balance
create.insufficientBalance.description: This task requires {{symbol}}{{required}}, your current balance is {{symbol}}{{current}}, deficit {{symbol}}{{deficit}}. Would you like to recharge {{symbol}}{{rechargeAmount}}?
create.insufficientBalance.balanceSuffic: Your previous task progress has been restored. Your balance is now sufficient. Would you like to create the task now?

create.interaction.workLinkPlaceholder: Paste the link to the work you want interactions on

create.interaction.validation.actionsReq: Please select at least one interaction action
create.interaction.validation.unsupporte: Please enter a supported platform link (Supported: Xiaohongshu, TikTok, YouTube, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Bilibili, Douyin)
verifyCode.AI_THEME_MISMATCH: AI determined content is not relevant to the task (score: {{matchScore}}/100, threshold: {{threshold}})
verifyCode.AI_CANNOT_ANALYZE: AI could not analyze the content, manual review required
verifyCode.WORK_LINK_INVALID: Work link is invalid or the work has been deleted
verifyCode.WORK_LINK_INFO_FAILED: Failed to parse work link information
verifyCode.WORK_ALREADY_SUBMITTED: This work has already been submitted for another task
verifyCode.PLATFORM_NOT_DETECTED: Unable to detect platform from the provided link
verifyCode.PUBLISH_RECORD_STATUS_INVALID: Publish record status is invalid, content may not have been published or has been deleted
verifyCode.MAX_RETRY_NO_RECORD_AND_LINK: Exceeded maximum retry attempts (no publish record and work link)
verifyCode.MAX_RETRY_NO_RECORD_OR_LINK: Exceeded maximum retry attempts (missing publish record or work link)
verifyCode.MAX_RETRY_NO_WORK_LINK: Exceeded maximum retry attempts (no work link)
verifyCode.DRAFT_SIMILARITY_LOW: Published work has low similarity to draft (similarity: {{score}}/100, threshold: {{threshold}})

create.tabInteractionDesc: Publish interaction needs and let users like, bookmark, and comment on your content
